name: opencode
description: Query any opencode-supported model from inside Claude — get a second opinion without leaving your session. Defaults to GitHub Copilot models; configurable via OPENCODE_MODEL_ALLOW.
author: kud

requiredEnv.name: OPENCODE_MODEL_ALLOW
requiredEnv.description: Comma-separated list of allowed model patterns (e.g. github-copilot/*). Defaults to github-copilot/* if unset.

requiredEnv.name: OPENCODE_MODEL_BLOCK
requiredEnv.description: Comma-separated list of blocked model patterns. Optional.
